scores
def analyze(scores):
    avg = sum(scores)/len(scores)
    high = max(scores)
    low = min(scores)
    pass_count = sum(1 for s in scores if s >= 60)
    fail_count = len(scores) - pass_count
    return {
        'average_score': avg,
        'highest_score': high,
        'lowest_score': low,
        'passed': pass_count,
        'failed': fail_count
    }
